allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== containers ==="; docker ps --format "{{.Names}}`t{{.Status}}`t{{.Ports}}"; Write-Output "=== who holds :8080 ==="; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)  $\($p.ProcessName\)  $\($p.Path\)" } } else { "nothing listening on 8080" })

PowerShell($jh = \(& java -XshowSettings:properties -version 2>&1 | Select-String 'java.home'\).ToString\(\).Split\('='\)[1].Trim\(\); Write-Output "JAVA_HOME=$jh"; $javap = Join-Path $jh 'bin\\javap.exe'; $jar = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.m2\\repository\\org\\springframework\\boot\\spring-boot-http-client\\4.1.0\\spring-boot-http-client-4.1.0.jar'; Write-Output "=== HttpClientSettings ==="; & $javap -cp $jar org.springframework.boot.http.client.HttpClientSettings | Select-String -Pattern 'public|Duration|ofSeconds' | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== WSL distros ==="; wsl -l -v; Write-Output "=== before: docker-desktop date ==="; wsl -d docker-desktop -e date -u; Write-Output "=== sync hwclock ==="; wsl -d docker-desktop -e hwclock -s 2>&1; Write-Output "=== after: docker-desktop date ==="; wsl -d docker-desktop -e date -u)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d kafka)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d --build order-service payment-service postgres prometheus grafana kafka-ui)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate kafka)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d --build --force-recreate order-service payment-service)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d --build order-service)
